title: DFE-045 Bedridden Deep Throating Maeno Nana - Nana Maeno
description: Wipe your body ... and hold it. An old man living with Nana, the daughter-in-law's stepchild. The bride left Nana and went out to escape from the care of a man who was bedridden due to illness. Instead, a man who hits an unabated greed stick against a pitiful Nana who cares for him, and squeezes his throat while holding a handicapped body. However, Nana didn't refuse it ... He obediently accepted and continued to hold. It should have been painful and painful, but for some reason my heart was filled. For Nana, who was abandoned by her mother and felt denied her existence, she may have found the significance of her existence by co-depending on a man.
